---
title: "Assumptions and Limitations"
id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec02-sp02"
section_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec02"
session_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02"
toc: True
---











<!-- IMPORT_START -->

Calculating vaccine effectiveness is only the first step. Interpreting the result correctly is essential.

## Understanding the Result

::: {.callout-important}
A vaccine effectiveness of 80% indicates a reduction in risk, not complete protection
:::

## Interpreting in Context

::: {.panel-tabset}
## Meaning
Indicates reduced probability of infection

## Assumptions
Groups must be comparable

## Limitations
External factors may influence results

:::
## Avoiding Common Errors

::: {.callout-note collapse='true'}

Step 1 :: VE does not mean 80% are protected
Step 2 :: VE does not apply equally to all individuals
Step 3 :: VE depends on context and exposure
:::

## Critical Reflection

::: {.callout-tip}
**Self-check:** What factors could distort vaccine effectiveness estimates?

**Suggested answer**

Differences in exposure, reporting accuracy, and population characteristics
:::

## Key Insight

::: {.callout-note}
Interpretation requires understanding both the calculation and its assumptions
:::

<!-- IMPORT_END -->
_Add your primary content here. Use headings, lists, and images as needed._

---

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec02-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Interpreting Vaccine Effectiveness</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec02-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Common Misinterpretations</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
